meaning: 克赖斯特彻奇[新西兰南岛东岸港市](意译基督堂市)
examples: Yellow shows urban areas, including Christchurch.
Christchurch, New Zealand, hosts the World Buskers Festival.
Right on time, after four hours and 21 minutes, we drew into Christchurch station.
Ms Kurbatoff says young Christchurch people have a voice and they are prepared to use it.
Christchurch and East Dorset authorities have agreed to move most staff to offices in Christchurch.
